startPoint.en: Talk to Trader Stan in Port Sarim about the Skulls pirate named Jed.
startPoint.es: Habla con Trader Stan en Port Sarim sobre el pirata de los Skulls llamado Jed.

recommended.name: Port Sarim lodestone
recommended.display: Activated Port Sarim and Draynor lodestones

rewards.name: Elite Dungeons
rewards.display: Ability to use the teleport on the chests of the Elite Dungeons

text.en: Right click to talk to Trader Stan located at the south-eastern dock of Port Sarim. Finish all dialogue.
text.es: Haz clic derecho para hablar con Trader Stan, situado en el muelle sureste de Port Sarim. Termina todo el diálogo.

chatOptions: 2 Talk about the Skulls pirate, Jed.

text.en: Talk to Guard Captain Roarkwin in the Port Sarim jail located to the west.
text.es: Habla con Guard Captain Roarkwin en la cárcel de Port Sarim, situada al oeste.

text.en: Enter the port portal near the northern dock.
text.es: Entra en el portal del puerto cerca del muelle norte.

text.en: Ignore the dialogue about Meg which triggers after you enter the portal.
text.es: Ignora el diálogo sobre Meg que se activa al entrar en el portal.

text.en: Talk to Seasinger Umi to the southeast of the portal.
text.es: Habla con Seasinger Umi, al sureste del portal.

text.en: Talk to the Barmaid in a building to the northwest of the portal.
text.es: Habla con la Barmaid en un edificio al noroeste del portal.

text.en: Climb up the stairs and talk to Mister Gully.
text.es: Sube las escaleras y habla con Mister Gully.

text.en: Head to the pottery house in Draynor Village and climb up the stairs.
text.es: Dirígete a la casa de alfarería en Draynor Village y sube las escaleras.

text.en: Talk to the Black Knight sergeant.
text.es: Habla con el sargento de los Black Knight.

text.en: Head to Rimmington and talk to Seasinger Jemi near the well.
text.es: Dirígete a Rimmington y habla con Seasinger Jemi cerca del pozo.

text.en: Back at the Port Sarim docks, talk to Trader Stan.
text.es: De vuelta en los muelles de Port Sarim, habla con Trader Stan.

chatOptions: 2 Talk about the Skulls pirate, Jed.
